label: professional_details
value: Registered nurse with an advanced wound care certification and recently completed an advanced certification course in IV therapy, eager to integrate new skills into daily responsibilities, now pursuing a BSN full-time with a scholarship, involved in a community health initiative requiring flexible hours, attended a regional nursing conference and enjoyed workshops on advanced patient care, interested in further hands-on learning experiences and upcoming workshops/seminars on patient care techniques. Leverages volunteer experience in professional development by highlighting skills such as communication, empathy, leadership, cultural competency, problem-solving, and networking. Interested in tools and equipment for IV therapy, including catheters, needles, IV pumps, infusion devices, tubing, accessories, sterile techniques, and monitoring equipment. Seeks to apply skills in critical care, long-term IV therapy, pediatric care, complex medication regimens, and emergency situations. Prefers self-study materials for BSN coursework due to convenience and flexibility.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Continues practicing yoga and meditation for stress management, maintains a flexitarian meal plan for energy levels

label: dietary_preferences
value: Recently decided to go vegetarian, enjoys cooking with more vegetables and legumes

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Interested in recent articles and books on medical technology and patient stories

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in strategies and tools for managing time and staying organized while balancing studies and work, including prioritizing tasks, time blocking, setting specific goals, using the Pomodoro Technique, delegating tasks, and regularly reviewing and adjusting schedules. Interested in tools such as digital calendars (Google Calendar, Outlook), task management apps (Trello, Asana), note-taking apps (Evernote, Notion), focus and productivity apps (Forest, Focus@Will), study tools (Quizlet, Anki), and communication tools (Slack, Microsoft Teams).

label: important_personal_details
value: Hospital recently started offering fixed daytime shifts, providing more flexibility during evenings and weekends; looking to balance work and personal life better

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Joined a local healthcare-related volunteer group that provides free health screenings and educational workshops in underserved communities, aiming to make the most out of the volunteer experience by understanding community needs, engaging actively, building relationships, documenting experiences, reflecting on learning, seeking feedback, integrating into resume and LinkedIn, networking, continuing education, managing time effectively, and communicating with stakeholders.
